overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring a sunlit forest canyon with tall rock walls and scattered trees. The character walks along a dirt trail, crosses a shallow stream with a brief camera angle shift, and continues through the rocky woodland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest canyon trail between tall rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the forested canyon with rock walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon trail
tall vertical rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon trail
scattered evergreen trees growing along the trail path
narrow dirt trail winding through the rocky forest terrain
large rocks and stone debris along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by tall rock cliffs on both sides. Sunlight filters through the scattered pine trees overhead, creating dappled lighting on the path ahead.

events.description: character steps from dirt trail into shallow water stream, creating splashes
camera temporarily shifts to top-down aerial view then returns to third-person follow

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream with water splashing around her feet

entered.detail: clear shallow water flowing across the trail path
submerged and partially visible rocks within the stream bed

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow stream crossing, with water splashing around her feet as she walks. The camera briefly shifts to a top-down perspective before returning to the standard third-person follow view.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending forest trail with large boulders

events.description: exits the shallow stream and continues onto the dirt trail heading uphill

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through the forest trail surrounded by large rock formations and scattered trees

entered.detail: cluster of large mossy boulders scattered along the left side of the trail
overhanging rock formation creating partial shade on the path

segments.scene_description: After crossing the stream, the character continues ascending the dirt trail through a section with large scattered boulders and rock overhangs. The path winds between tall pine trees and mossy rock formations as the terrain gradually climbs upward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow canyon that gradually ascends into a rugged, boulder-strewn woodland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail enclosed by towering rock cliffs, where sunlight filters through pine trees to create dappled patterns on the ground. As the path leads into a shallow stream, the camera briefly shifts to a top-down perspective to capture the splashing water before returning to a standard follow view. The scene then opens up as the character exits the water and begins climbing a winding trail characterized by large scattered boulders and mossy rock formations. Finally, the terrain continues to rise upward, weaving between tall pines and rocky overhangs.
